title: HealthXP
description: Short Description: Gain experience based on the health of mobs!
body:
HeartXP is a lightweight Minecraft mod that makes experience gains proportional to the health of mobs. Each half-heart of a mob contributes to the amount of XP you receive, making battles more rewarding and strategic.

Features:

XP scales with mob health.

Easy to install, compatible with Minecraft 1.20.1.

Minimal performance impact.

Enhances survival and RPG-style gameplay.its especially good for someones using mods like improved mobs,

Whether you're hunting low-health mobs for quick XP or challenging powerful enemies for massive rewards, HeartXP makes every fight count!
